creator: charlz_klug@mail.ru
text:
Problem in web-interface of Sams software (/usr/ports/www/sams). After logging in Sams web-interface I get "Fatal error: Cannot redeclare GetHostName() in /usr/local/share/sams/src/webconfigtray.php on line 25" in address "http://localhost/sams/".

Fix: Replace "GetHostName()" with "GetHostNameSams()" in /usr/local/share/sams/src/webconfigtray.php .

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: After installing and configuring Apache web-server just logging to Sams web-interface. And we enter to "http://localhost/sams/" link.
